recipe.rationale: Boundary point for healthy class at VB 0.1. Force std raised to 1.08 (near upper bound) to simulate mild variability without crossing worn threshold (worn/healthy RMS=1.66). Vibration std slightly elevated (1.06) for realism. Mean multipliers kept low (1.01-1.05) to avoid worn-like amplitude shift.
